common.downloadStepDescription: Use the download button above to get {programTitle} from the developer's official site (recommended for safe activation).

hero.subtitle: Free giveaway CD keys for {programTitle} — copy a working key and activate in the Windows app.

keyTable.intro: Giveaway CD keys for {programTitle}. Pick a working row, copy the key, and paste it wherever the app asks for your CD key.
keyTable.reportTitle: Report the status of this CD key
keyTable.expiringDisclaimer: Note: Once expired, the key won't activate and your software's pro version will stop working.

activationInstructions.pageTitle: How to activate {programTitle} with a free CD key
activationInstructions.pageLead: Giveaway keys and activation steps for {programTitle} — unlock Pro features with a verified license from our list.
activationInstructions.sectionSubtitle: Follow these steps to activate {programTitle} with your free CD key.

activate.title: Open activation in the app
activate.description: Launch {programTitle} and find “Enter a key”, “Already have a license”, or “Activate” in the menu or settings.

paste.title: Paste your free CD key
paste.description: Copy a working key from the table on this page and paste it into the activation field in {programTitle}.

tips: Download {programTitle} only from the official vendor or the link on this page — avoid repacked installers.
If a giveaway CD key fails, try another working key from the list.
Some programs need an internet connection to verify your license during activation.

seo.descriptionFallback: Free {programTitle} giveaway CD keys for Windows. {workingKeys} working keys out of {totalKeys} — copy a license and activate in-app. Official download recommended.

hero.subtitle: Free PRO account access for {programTitle} — copy the credentials and sign in to unlock the paid tier.

keyTable.intro: Giveaway PRO accounts for {programTitle}. Copy a working row and sign in with the username and password in the official app or website.
keyTable.reportTitle: Report the status of this account
keyTable.expiringDisclaimer: Note: Once expired, this shared login may stop working and PRO features can be revoked.

activationInstructions.pageLead: Shared giveaway accounts for {programTitle} — sign in with the credentials from our verified list.
activationInstructions.sectionSubtitle: Follow these steps to use {programTitle} with a shared PRO account.

activate.title: Open sign-in in the app or site
activate.description: Launch {programTitle} (or the vendor site) and find “Sign in”, “Log in”, or “Account”.

paste.title: Sign in with the giveaway credentials
paste.description: Copy the username and password from the table on this page and sign in where the vendor asks for your account.

tips: Download {programTitle} only from the official vendor or the link on this page — avoid repacked installers.
If an account stops working, try another working row from the list.
Shared accounts can be revoked by the vendor — prefer an official license for long-term use.

keyTable.copyTitle: Open link in a new tab
keyTable.reportTitle: Report whether this offer still works

activationInstructions.pageTitle: How to get PRO access for {programTitle}
activationInstructions.pageLead: Official links and partner offers for {programTitle} — follow each vendor flow to unlock PRO or VIP.
activationInstructions.sectionSubtitle: Follow these steps to unlock {programTitle} using the official signup or partner offers.

activate.title: Open the official offer
activate.description: Use a link from the table on this page — complete any required signup on the developer or partner site.

paste.title: Sign in after you get access
paste.description: Once the vendor confirms your PRO or VIP access, sign in inside {programTitle} with the account you used on their site.

tips: Only use links from trusted sources — avoid random “free account” pages that ask for unrelated permissions.
If an offer expires, try another working row from the list.
Prefer an official paid license if you need guaranteed updates and support.

seo.descriptionFallback: Official links and giveaways for {programTitle} PRO access. {workingKeys} active offers out of {totalKeys} — open a link and follow the vendor flow. Official download recommended.
